From HoTT Require Import TruncType ExcludedMiddle Modalities.ReflectiveSubuniverse abstract_algebra HSet.From HoTT Require Import TruncType ExcludedMiddle Modalities.ReflectiveSubuniverse abstract_algebra HSet.
From HoTT Require Import Universes.Smallness.
From HoTT Require Import Spaces.Card.

From HoTT.Sets Require Import Ordinals Powers.

Close Scope trunc_scope.

(** This file contains a construction of the Hartogs number. *)

(** We begin with some results about changing the universe of a power set using propositional resizing. *)


H: PropResizing
C: Type
p: C -> HProp
C -> HProp


H: PropResizing
C: Type
p: C -> HProp
C -> HProp

  exact (fun a => Build_HProp (smalltype@{k j} (p a))).
Defined.


H: PropResizing
ua: Univalence
C: Type
IsInjective power_inj


H: PropResizing
ua: Univalence
C: Type
IsInjective power_inj

  
H: PropResizing
ua: Univalence
C: Type
p, p': C -> HProp
power_inj p = power_inj p' -> p = p'
 
H: PropResizing
ua: Univalence
C: Type
p, p': C -> HProp
(fun a : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p a))) =
(fun a : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p' a))) -> p = p'

ua: Univalence
C: Type
p, p': C -> HProp
q: (fun a : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p a))) =
(fun a : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p' a)))
p = p'

ua: Univalence
C: Type
p, p': C -> HProp
q: (fun a : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p a))) =
(fun a : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p' a)))
p == p'

ua: Univalence
C: Type
p, p': C -> HProp

(fun a0 : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p' a0)))
a: C
p a = p' a

H: PropResizing
ua: Univalence
C: Type
p, p': C -> HProp
q: (fun a0 : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p a0))) =
(fun a0 : C => Build_HProp (smalltype (p' a0)))
a: C
Ha: p' a
p' a
 exact Ha.
Qed.

ua: Univalence

ua: Univalence

HProp
 exact (Build_HProp (smalltype (forall a, f a = b -> p a))).
Defined.

ua: Univalence

ua: Univalence
C, B: Type
f: C -> B

p, p': C -> HProp
q: power_morph f p = power_morph f p'
a: C

p' a
 exact Ha.
Qed.

(** We'll also need this result. *)

H: PropResizing
H0: Univalence
B, C: Ordinal
B < C -> card B ≤ card C


H: PropResizing
H0: Univalence
B, C: Ordinal
B < C -> card B ≤ card C

  
H: PropResizing
H0: Univalence
B, C: Ordinal
B_C: B < C
card B ≤ card C
 
H: PropResizing
H0: Univalence
B, C: Ordinal
B_C: B < C
{i : Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet C & IsInjective i}
 
H: PropResizing
H0: Univalence
B, C: Ordinal
B_C: B < C
{i : ordinal_carrier B -> ordinal_carrier C & IsInjective i}
 
H: PropResizing
H0: Univalence
B, C: Ordinal
B_C: B < C
{i : ordinal_carrier ↓((H ◁ B) B_C) -> ordinal_carrier C & IsInjective i}

  
H: PropResizing
H0: Univalence
B, C: Ordinal
B_C: B < C
IsInjective out
 
H: PropResizing
H0: Univalence
B, C: Ordinal
B_C: B < C
IsSimulation out
 apply is_simulation_out.
Qed.

(** * Hartogs number *)

Section Hartogs_Number.

  Declare Scope Hartogs.
  Open Scope Hartogs.

  Notation "'𝒫'" := power_type (at level 30) : Hartogs.

  Local Coercion subtype_as_type' {X} (Y : 𝒫 X) := { x : X & Y x }.

  Universe A.
  Context {univalence : Univalence}
          {prop_resizing : PropResizing}
          {lem: ExcludedMiddle}
          (A : HSet@{A}).

  (* The Hartogs number of [A] consists of all ordinals that embed into [A]. Note that this construction necessarily increases the universe level. *)

  Fail Check { B : Ordinal@{A _} | card B <= card A } : Type@{A}.

  
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
Ordinal

  
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
Ordinal

    
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type
Ordinal

    
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type
relation:= fun B C : carrier => B.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
Ordinal

    
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type
relation:= fun B C : carrier => B.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
IsOrdinal carrier lt

prop_resizing: PropResizing

relation:= fun B C : carrier => B.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type

IsInjective pr1
 apply isinj_embedding, (mapinO_pr1 (Tr (-1))). (* Faster than [exact _.] *)
    
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type

univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type
relation:= fun B C : carrier => B.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
forall a a' : {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}, a < a' -> a.1 < a'.1
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type
relation:= fun B C : carrier => B.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
forall (a : {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}) (b : Ordinal),
b < a.1 ->
hexists
  (fun a' : {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A} => ((a' < a) * (a'.1 = b))%type)

      
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type
relation:= fun B C : carrier => B.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
forall a a' : {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}, a < a' -> a.1 < a'.1
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type
relation:= fun B C : carrier => B.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
a, a': {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}
a_a': a < a'
a.1 < a'.1
 exact a_a'.
      
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}: Type
relation:= fun B C : carrier => B.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
forall (a : {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A}) (b : Ordinal),
b < a.1 ->
hexists
  (fun a' : {B : Ordinal & card B ≤ card A} => ((a' < a) * (a'.1 = b))%type)
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B0 : Ordinal & Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B0 -> A & IsInjective i}}: Type
relation:= fun B0 C0 : carrier => B0.1 < C0.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
B: Ordinal
small_B: Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B -> A & IsInjective i}
C: Ordinal
C_B: C < B
Trunc (-1)
  {a'
  : {B0 : Ordinal & Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B0 -> A & IsInjective i}}
  & ((a' < (B; small_B)) * (a'.1 = C))%type}
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle

carrier:= {B0 : Ordinal & Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B0 -> A & IsInjective i}}: Type
relation:= fun B0 C0 : carrier => B0.1 < C0.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
B: Ordinal
small_B: Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B -> A & IsInjective i}
C: Ordinal
C_B: C < B
{a'
: {B0 : Ordinal & Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B0 -> A & IsInjective i}} &
((a' < (B; small_B)) * (a'.1 = C))%type}

f: ordinal_carrier B -> A
isinjective_f: IsInjective f

lem: ExcludedMiddle

A: HSet
carrier:= {B0 : Ordinal & Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B0 -> A & IsInjective i}}: Type
relation:= fun B0 C : carrier => B0.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
B: Ordinal
b: B
f: ordinal_carrier B -> A
isinjective_f: IsInjective f
{i : ordinal_carrier ↓b -> A & IsInjective i}

        
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B0 : Ordinal & Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B0 -> A & IsInjective i}}: Type
relation:= fun B0 C : carrier => B0.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
B: Ordinal
b: B
f: ordinal_carrier B -> A
isinjective_f: IsInjective f
IsInjective
  (fun pat : {b0 : ordinal_carrier B & smalltype (b0 < b)} => f pat.1)

        
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B0 : Ordinal & Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B0 -> A & IsInjective i}}: Type
relation:= fun B0 C : carrier => B0.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
B: Ordinal
b: B
f: ordinal_carrier B -> A
isinjective_f: IsInjective f
x: ordinal_carrier B
x_b: smalltype (x < b)
y: ordinal_carrier B
y_b: smalltype (y < b)
fx_fy: f x = f y
(x; x_b) = (y; y_b)

lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet

relation:= fun B0 C : carrier => B0.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type

b: B
f: ordinal_carrier B -> A
isinjective_f: IsInjective f
x: ordinal_carrier B
x_b: smalltype (x < b)
y: ordinal_carrier B
y_b: smalltype (y < b)
fx_fy: f x = f y
x = y

        
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
carrier:= {B0 : Ordinal & Trunc (-1) {i : ordinal_carrier B0 -> A & IsInjective i}}: Type
relation:= fun B0 C : carrier => B0.1 < C.1: carrier -> carrier -> Type
B: Ordinal
b: B
f: ordinal_carrier B -> A
isinjective_f: IsInjective f
x: ordinal_carrier B
x_b: smalltype (x < b)
y: ordinal_carrier B
y_b: smalltype (y < b)
fx_fy: f x = f y
f x = f y
 exact fx_fy.
  Defined.

  Definition proper_subtype_inclusion (U V : 𝒫 A)
    := (forall a, U a -> V a) /\ merely (exists a : A, V a /\ ~(U a)).

  Infix "⊊" := proper_subtype_inclusion (at level 50) : Hartogs.
  Notation "(⊊)" := proper_subtype_inclusion : Hartogs.

  (* The Hartogs number of [A] embeds into the threefold power set of [A].  This preliminary injection also increases the universe level though. *)

prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
{f : hartogs_number' -> (𝒫) ((𝒫) ((𝒫) A)) & IsInjective f}

  (fun X : hartogs_number' =>
   (fun (B : Ordinal) (_ : card B ≤ card A) =>

B: Ordinal
B_A: card B ≤ card A
C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
(B; B_A) = (C; C_A)

f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
X: (𝒫) A
b1: B
Hb1: forall a0 : A, X a0 <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b1) * (a0 = f b'))%type}
b2: B
Hb2: forall a0 : A, X a0 <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b2) * (a0 = f b'))%type}
b: ordinal_carrier B
a: A
IsHProp (X a -> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type})

prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet

b2: B

injective_f: IsInjective f
X: (𝒫) A
b1: B

f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
X: (𝒫) A
b1: B
b': ordinal_carrier B
b2: B
H2: b' < b2
Hb2: forall a : A, X a <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b2) * (a = f b'0))%type}

b' < b2

              exact H2.
            
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X0 => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X0: forall X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X0
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X0; ϕ X0) B)) =
(fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X0; ϕ X0) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
X: (𝒫) A
b1: B
Hb1: forall a : A, X a <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b1) * (a = f b'0))%type}
b2: B
Hb2: forall a : A, X a <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b2) * (a = f b'0))%type}
b': ordinal_carrier B
b' < b2 -> b' < b1
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing

A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X0 => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X0: forall X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X0
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X0; ϕ X0) B)) =
(fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X0; ϕ X0) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
X: (𝒫) A
b1: B
Hb1: forall a : A, X a <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b1) * (a = f b'0))%type}
b2: B
Hb2: forall a : A, X a <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b2) * (a = f b'0))%type}
b': ordinal_carrier B
b'_b2: b' < b2
b' < b1

A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X0 => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X0: forall X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X0
B, C: Ordinal

H0: (fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X0; ϕ X0) B)) =

injective_f: IsInjective f
X: (𝒫) A
b1: B
Hb1: forall a : A, X a <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b1) * (a = f b'0))%type}
b2: B
b': ordinal_carrier B
Hb2: X (f b') <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b2) * (f b' = f b'0))%type}
b'_b2: b' < b2
b' < b1

univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
{X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) & Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B}

prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
Isomorphism
  (fun X : (𝒫) A =>
   Build_HProp
     {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}};
  ϕ
    (fun X : (𝒫) A =>
     Build_HProp
       {b : B &
       forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}))
  B

IsHProp
  {b0 : B &

b: B
a: Build_HSet A
b1: B
b1_b: b1 < b
p: a = f b1
b2: B
b2_b: b2 < b
q: a = f b2
(b1; (b1_b, p)) = (b2; (b2_b, q))

lem: ExcludedMiddle

IsHProp
  {b0 : B &
  forall a : A, X a <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b0) * (a = f b'0))%type}}
b: B
b': A
{b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b) * (b' = f b'0))%type} <->

univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
(fun
   X0 : {x : (𝒫) A &
        Build_HProp
          {b : B &
          forall a : A, x a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}} =>
 (fun (X : (𝒫) A)
    (proj2 : Build_HProp
               {b : B &
               forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}) =>
  (fun (b : B)
     (_ : forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}) =>
   b) proj2.1 proj2.2) X0.1 X0.2)
o (fun b : B =>
   (fun a : Build_HSet A =>
    Build_HProp {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type};
   b;
   fun b' : A =>
   iff_reflexive {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b) * (b' = f b'0))%type}
   :
   Build_HProp {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b) * (b' = f b'0))%type} <->
   {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b) * (b' = f b'0))%type})) ==
idmap

  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
(fun b : B =>
 (fun a : Build_HSet A => Build_HProp {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type};
 b;
 fun b' : A =>
 iff_reflexive {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b) * (b' = f b'0))%type}

o (fun
     X0 : {x : (𝒫) A &
          Build_HProp
            {b : B &
            forall a : A, x a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}} =>
   (fun (X : (𝒫) A)
      (proj2 : Build_HProp
                 {b : B &
                 forall a : A,
                 X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}) =>
    (fun (b : B)
       (_ : forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}) =>

H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
(fun
   x : {x : (𝒫) A &
       {b : ordinal_carrier B &
       forall a : A,
       x a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}} =>
 (fun a : A =>
  Build_HProp {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < (x.2).1) * (a = f b'))%type};
 (x.2).1;
 fun b' : A =>
 iff_reflexive
   {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < (x.2).1) * (b' = f b'0))%type})) ==
idmap

b;

A: HSet

IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}

(a : {x : (𝒫) A &

       {b : B &

        {b : B &
        forall a0 : A, x a0 <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a0 = f b'))%type}}}),

     {b : B &
     forall a0 : A, X a0 <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a0 = f b'))%type}})
  a a' <->

               {b : B &
               forall a0 : A,

                    {b : B &

        b) proj2.1 proj2.2) X0.1 X0.2)

      b;

     ((fun x0 : ordinal_carrier B => 1%path)
      :
      (fun

              Build_HProp
                {b : B &
                forall a0 : A,
                x a0 <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a0 = f b'))%type}}} =>
       (fun (X : (𝒫) A)
          (proj2 : Build_HProp
                     {b : B &
                     forall a0 : A,

        (fun (b : B)

     (((fun
          x : {x : (𝒫) A &
              {b : ordinal_carrier B &

        (fun (X : (𝒫) A)
           (proj2 : {b : ordinal_carrier B &

           proj2.1 proj2.2)
          x.1 x.2)
       :

     a)
  (equiv_adjointify

univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
forall
(a : {x : (𝒫) A &
     {b : ordinal_carrier B &
     forall a : A,
     x a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}})
(a' : {x : (𝒫) A &
      {b : ordinal_carrier B &
      forall a0 : A,
      x a0 <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b) * (a0 = f b'))%type}}}),
ϕ
  (fun X : (𝒫) A =>
   Build_HProp
     {b : ordinal_carrier B &
     forall a0 : A,
     X a0 <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b) * (a0 = f b'))%type}})
  a a' <->
(a.2).1 < (a'.2).1

lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X

IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}

b1: ordinal_carrier B

X1 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b1) * (a = f b'))%type}

X2 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b2) * (a = f b'))%type}
ϕ
  (fun X : (𝒫) A =>
   Build_HProp
     {b : ordinal_carrier B &
     forall a : A,
     X a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}})

prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X

IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}

b1: ordinal_carrier B

X1 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b1) * (a = f b'))%type}
X2: (𝒫) A
b2: ordinal_carrier B
H'2: forall a : A,
X2 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b2) * (a = f b'))%type}
(forall a : A, (X1; b1; H'1).1 a -> (X2; b2; H'2).1 a) *
merely {a : A & ((X2; b2; H'2).1 a * ~ (X1; b1; H'1).1 a)%type} <-> 
b1 < b2
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B
H'1: forall a : A,
X1 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b1) * (a = f b'))%type}
X2: (𝒫) A
b2: ordinal_carrier B
H'2: forall a : A,
X2 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b2) * (a = f b'))%type}
(forall a : A, X1 a -> X2 a) * Trunc (-1) {a : A & (X2 a * ~ X1 a)%type} <->
b1 < b2

lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B
H'1: forall a : A,
X1 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b1) * (a = f b'))%type}
X2: (𝒫) A
b2: ordinal_carrier B
H'2: forall a : A,
X2 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b2) * (a = f b'))%type}
b1_b2: b1 = b2
Trunc (-1) {a : A & (X2 a * ~ X1 a)%type} -> Empty

b1: ordinal_carrier B

b2: ordinal_carrier B

X2 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b2) * (a = f b'))%type}
b1_b2: b1 = b2
{a : A & (X2 a * ~ X1 a)%type} -> Empty

X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B

not_X1a: ~ X1 a

A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A

f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B
H'1: forall a : A,
X1 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b1) * (a = f b'))%type}

X2 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b2) * (a = f b'))%type}

b2_b1: b2 < b1

  {b : B &

H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B &
  forall a0 : A, X a0 <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}}
X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B
H'1: forall a0 : A,
X1 a0 <-> {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b1) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}
X2: (𝒫) A
b2: ordinal_carrier B
H'2: forall a0 : A,
X2 a0 <-> {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b2) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}
b2_b1: b2 < b1
a: A
b': ordinal_carrier B
b'_b2: b' < b2
a_fb': a = f b'
not_X1a: ~ X1 a
(b' < b1) * (a = f b')
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle

lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B
H'1: forall a : A,
X1 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b1) * (a = f b'))%type}
X2: (𝒫) A
b2: ordinal_carrier B
H'2: forall a : A,
X2 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b2) * (a = f b'))%type}
b1 < b2 ->
(forall a : A, X1 a -> X2 a) * Trunc (-1) {a : A & (X2 a * ~ X1 a)%type}

ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X

C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B &
  forall a0 : A, X a0 <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}}
X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B
H'1: forall a0 : A,
X1 a0 <-> {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b1) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}
X2: (𝒫) A
b2: ordinal_carrier B
H'2: forall a0 : A,
X2 a0 <-> {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b2) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}
b1_b2: b1 < b2
a: A
b': ordinal_carrier B
b'_b1: b' < b1
a_fb': a = f b'
b' < b2
 transitivity b1; assumption.
                
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B &
  forall a0 : A, X a0 <-> {b'0 : B & ((b'0 < b) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}}
X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B
H'1: forall a0 : A,
X1 a0 <-> {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b1) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}
X2: (𝒫) A
b2: ordinal_carrier B
H'2: forall a0 : A,
X2 a0 <-> {b'0 : ordinal_carrier B & ((b'0 < b2) * (a0 = f b'0))%type}
b1_b2: b1 < b2
a: A
b': ordinal_carrier B
b'_b1: b' < b1
a_fb': a = f b'
a = f b'
 assumption.
              
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X: forall X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B)) =
(fun X : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
H2: forall X : (𝒫) A,
IsHProp
  {b : B & forall a : A, X a <-> {b' : B & ((b' < b) * (a = f b'))%type}}
X1: (𝒫) A
b1: ordinal_carrier B
H'1: forall a : A,
X1 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b1) * (a = f b'))%type}
X2: (𝒫) A
b2: ordinal_carrier B
H'2: forall a : A,
X2 a <-> {b' : ordinal_carrier B & ((b' < b2) * (a = f b'))%type}
b1_b2: b1 < b2
Trunc (-1) {a : A & (X2 a * ~ X1 a)%type}

lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
ϕ:= fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => (fun x1 x2 : X0 => (⊊) x1.1 x2.1) : Lt X0: forall X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A), Lt X0
B, C: Ordinal
C_A: card C ≤ card A
H0: (fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X0; ϕ X0) B)) =
(fun X0 : (𝒫) ((𝒫) A) => merely (Isomorphism (X0; ϕ X0) C))
f: Build_HSet B -> Build_HSet A
injective_f: IsInjective f
X: (𝒫) ((𝒫) A)
iso: Isomorphism (X; ϕ X) B
Isomorphism B C

  (** Using hprop resizing, the threefold power set can be pushed to the same universe level as [A]. *)

  
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
X: (𝒫) ((𝒫) ((𝒫) A))
(𝒫) ((𝒫) ((𝒫) A)) : Type

    exact power_inj.
  Defined.

lem: ExcludedMiddle

uni_fix X = uni_fix Y -> X = Y

prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet

power_morph (power_morph power_inj) X = power_morph (power_morph power_inj) Y ->
X = Y

H: power_morph (power_morph power_inj) X = power_morph (power_morph power_inj) Y
IsInjective (power_morph power_inj)

prop_resizing: PropResizing

A: HSet
X, Y: (𝒫) ((𝒫) ((𝒫) A))
H: power_morph (power_morph power_inj) X = power_morph (power_morph power_inj) Y
P, Q: (𝒫) ((𝒫) A)
power_morph power_inj P = power_morph power_inj Q -> P = Q
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
X, Y: (𝒫) ((𝒫) ((𝒫) A))
H: power_morph (power_morph power_inj) X = power_morph (power_morph power_inj) Y
P, Q: (𝒫) ((𝒫) A)
H': power_morph power_inj P = power_morph power_inj Q
IsInjective power_inj

    
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
X, Y: (𝒫) ((𝒫) ((𝒫) A))
H: power_morph (power_morph power_inj) X = power_morph (power_morph power_inj) Y
P, Q: (𝒫) ((𝒫) A)
H': power_morph power_inj P = power_morph power_inj Q
p, q: (𝒫) A
power_inj p = power_inj q -> p = q
 apply injective_power_inj.
  Qed.

  (* We can therefore resize the Hartogs number of A to the same universe level as A. *)

  Definition hartogs_number_carrier : Type@{A}
    := {X : 𝒫 (𝒫 (𝒫 A)) | smalltype (merely (exists a, uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a) = X))}.

  
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
hartogs_number_carrier <~> hartogs_number'

prop_resizing: PropResizing

A: HSet
hartogs_number_carrier <~> hartogs_number'

lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
hartogs_number' <~> hartogs_number_carrier

prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
hartogs_number' -> hartogs_number_carrier

IsEquiv ?equiv_fun

hartogs_number_carrier

lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
a: hartogs_number'
smalltype
  (merely
     {a0 : hartogs_number' &
     uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
     uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)})

      
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet

{a0 : hartogs_number' &

univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
a: hartogs_number'
uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a) =
uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)
 reflexivity.
    
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
IsEquiv
  (fun a : hartogs_number' =>
   (uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a);
   let X :=
     fun (X : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X) =>
     equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X) in
   let X0 :=
     fun (X0 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X0) => (equiv_smalltype X0)^-1 in
   X0
     (merely
        {a0 : hartogs_number' &
        uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
        uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)})
     (issmall_hprop
        (merely
           {a0 : hartogs_number' &
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)})
        (istrunc_truncation (-1)
           {a0 : hartogs_number' &
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)}))
     (tr (a; 1%path))))
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
IsConnMap (Tr (-1))
  (fun a : hartogs_number' =>
   (uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a);
   let X :=
     fun (X : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X) =>
     equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X) in
   let X0 :=
     fun (X0 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X0) => (equiv_smalltype X0)^-1 in
   X0
     (merely
        {a0 : hartogs_number' &
        uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
        uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)})
     (issmall_hprop
        (merely
           {a0 : hartogs_number' &
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)})
        (istrunc_truncation (-1)
           {a0 : hartogs_number' &
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)}))
     (tr (a; 1%path))))
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
IsEmbedding
  (fun a : hartogs_number' =>
   (uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a);
   let X :=
     fun (X : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X) =>
     equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X) in
   let X0 :=
     fun (X0 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X0) => (equiv_smalltype X0)^-1 in
   X0
     (merely
        {a0 : hartogs_number' &
        uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
        uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)})
     (issmall_hprop
        (merely
           {a0 : hartogs_number' &
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a0) =
           uni_fix (hartogs_number'_injection.1 a)})
        (istrunc_truncation (-1)

    := resize_ordinal hartogs_number' hartogs_number_carrier hartogs_equiv.

  (* This final definition by satisfies the expected cardinality properties. *)

univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
f: hartogs_number_carrier -> A
Hf: IsInjective f
HN: card hartogs_number ≤ card A
HNO:= (hartogs_number; HN): hartogs_number'
X: Isomorphism hartogs_number ↓hartogs_number
(fun X0 : ↓hartogs_number =>
 (fun (a : Ordinal) (Ha : smalltype (a < hartogs_number)) =>
  let X1 :=
    fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) => equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1)
    in
  let Ha0 :=
    X1 (a < hartogs_number)
      (issmall_hprop (a < hartogs_number)
         (ordinal_relation_is_mere a hartogs_number))
      Ha
    in
  ((a;
   transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
     (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN);
  let X2 :=
    fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
    equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
  let X3 := fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1
    in
  X3
    ((a;
     transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
       (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
     HNO)
    (issmall_hprop
       ((a;
        transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
          (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
        HNO)
       (ordinal_relation_is_mere
          (a;
          transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
            (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN)
          HNO))
    (Ha0
     :
     (a;
     transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
       (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
     HNO)))
   X0.1 X0.2)
o (fun X0 : ↓HNO =>
   (fun proj1 : hartogs_number' =>
    (fun (a : Ordinal) (Ha : card a ≤ card A) (H : smalltype ((a; Ha) < HNO)) =>
     let X1 :=
       fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
       equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
     let H0 :=
       X1 ((a; Ha) < HNO)
         (issmall_hprop ((a; Ha) < HNO)
            (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a; Ha) HNO))
         H
       in
     (a;
     let X2 :=
       fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
       equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
     let X3 :=
       fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1 in
     X3 (a < hartogs_number)
       (issmall_hprop (a < hartogs_number)
          (ordinal_relation_is_mere a hartogs_number))
       H0))
      proj1.1 proj1.2)
     X0.1 X0.2) ==
idmap
 
univalence: Univalence
prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
f: hartogs_number_carrier -> A
Hf: IsInjective f
HN: card hartogs_number ≤ card A
HNO:= (hartogs_number; HN): hartogs_number'
X: Isomorphism hartogs_number ↓hartogs_number
a: ↓HNO
(let X0 :=
   fun (X0 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X0) => equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X0)
   in
 let Ha :=
   X0
     ((let X1 :=
         fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
         equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
       let H :=
         X1 (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
           (issmall_hprop (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
              (ordinal_relation_is_mere ((a.1).1; (a.1).2) HNO))
           a.2
         in
       ((a.1).1;
       let X2 :=
         fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
         equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
       let X3 :=
         fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1 in
       X3 ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
         (issmall_hprop ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
            (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a.1).1 hartogs_number))
         H)).1 <
      hartogs_number)
     (issmall_hprop
        ((let X1 :=
            fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
            equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
          let H :=
            X1 (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
              (issmall_hprop (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
                 (ordinal_relation_is_mere ((a.1).1; (a.1).2) HNO))
              a.2
            in
          ((a.1).1;
          let X2 :=
            fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
            equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
          let X3 :=
            fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1
            in
          X3 ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
            (issmall_hprop ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
               (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a.1).1 hartogs_number))
            H)).1 <
         hartogs_number)
        (ordinal_relation_is_mere
           (let X1 :=
              fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
              equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
            let H :=
              X1 (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
                (issmall_hprop (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
                   (ordinal_relation_is_mere ((a.1).1; (a.1).2) HNO))
                a.2
              in
            ((a.1).1;
            let X2 :=
              fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
              equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
            let X3 :=
              fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) =>
              (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1 in
            X3 ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
              (issmall_hprop ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
                 (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a.1).1 hartogs_number))
              H)).1
           hartogs_number))
     (let X1 :=
        fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
        equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
      let H :=
        X1 (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
          (issmall_hprop (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
             (ordinal_relation_is_mere ((a.1).1; (a.1).2) HNO))
          a.2
        in
      ((a.1).1;
      let X2 :=
        fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
        equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
      let X3 :=
        fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1 in
      X3 ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
        (issmall_hprop ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
           (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a.1).1 hartogs_number))
        H)).2
   in
 (((let X1 :=
      fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
      equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
    let H :=
      X1 (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
        (issmall_hprop (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
           (ordinal_relation_is_mere ((a.1).1; (a.1).2) HNO))
        a.2
      in
    ((a.1).1;
    let X2 :=
      fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
      equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
    let X3 :=
      fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1 in
    X3 ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
      (issmall_hprop ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
         (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a.1).1 hartogs_number))
      H)).1;
  transitive_card
    (card
       (let X1 :=
          fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
          equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
        let H :=
          X1 (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
            (issmall_hprop (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
               (ordinal_relation_is_mere ((a.1).1; (a.1).2) HNO))
            a.2
          in
        ((a.1).1;
        let X2 :=
          fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
          equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
        let X3 :=
          fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1
          in
        X3 ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
          (issmall_hprop ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
             (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a.1).1 hartogs_number))
          H)).1)
    (card hartogs_number) (card A)
    (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal
       (let X1 :=
          fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
          equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
        let H :=
          X1 (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
            (issmall_hprop (((a.1).1; (a.1).2) < HNO)
               (ordinal_relation_is_mere ((a.1).1; (a.1).2) HNO))
            a.2
          in
        ((a.1).1;
        let X2 :=
          fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
          equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
        let X3 :=
          fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1
          in
        X3 ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
          (issmall_hprop ((a.1).1 < hartogs_number)
             (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a.1).1 hartogs_number))
          H)).1
       hartogs_number Ha)
    HN);

prop_resizing: PropResizing
lem: ExcludedMiddle
A: HSet
f: hartogs_number_carrier -> A
Hf: IsInjective f
HN: card hartogs_number ≤ card A
HNO:= (hartogs_number; HN): hartogs_number'
X: Isomorphism hartogs_number ↓hartogs_number
(fun X0 : ↓HNO =>
 (fun proj1 : hartogs_number' =>
  (fun (a : Ordinal) (Ha : card a ≤ card A) (H : smalltype ((a; Ha) < HNO)) =>
   let X1 :=
     fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) => equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1)
     in
   let H0 :=
     X1 ((a; Ha) < HNO)
       (issmall_hprop ((a; Ha) < HNO) (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a; Ha) HNO))
       H
     in
   (a;
   let X2 :=
     fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
     equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
   let X3 :=
     fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1 in
   X3 (a < hartogs_number)
     (issmall_hprop (a < hartogs_number)
        (ordinal_relation_is_mere a hartogs_number))
     H0))
    proj1.1 proj1.2)
   X0.1 X0.2)
o (fun X0 : ↓hartogs_number =>
   (fun (a : Ordinal) (Ha : smalltype (a < hartogs_number)) =>
    let X1 :=
      fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
      equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
    let Ha0 :=
      X1 (a < hartogs_number)
        (issmall_hprop (a < hartogs_number)
           (ordinal_relation_is_mere a hartogs_number))
        Ha
      in
    ((a;
     transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
       (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN);
    let X2 :=
      fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
      equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
    let X3 :=
      fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1 in
    X3
      ((a;
       transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
         (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
       HNO)
      (issmall_hprop
         ((a;
          transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
            (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
          HNO)
         (ordinal_relation_is_mere
            (a;
            transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
              (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN)
            HNO))
      (Ha0
       :
       (a;
       transitive_card (card a) (card hartogs_number) 
         (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
       HNO)))
     X0.1 X0.2) ==
idmap

             hartogs_number)
            (issmall_hprop
               (((let X3 :=
                    fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) =>
                    equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X3) in
                  let Ha :=
                    X3 (a0.1 < hartogs_number)
                      (issmall_hprop (a0.1 < hartogs_number)
                         (ordinal_relation_is_mere a0.1 hartogs_number))
                      a0.2
                    in
                  ((a0.1;
                   transitive_card (card a0.1) (card hartogs_number) 
                     (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0.1 hartogs_number Ha)
                     HN);
                  let X4 :=
                    fun (X4 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X4) =>
                    equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X4) in
                  let X5 :=
                    fun (X5 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X5) =>
                    (equiv_smalltype X5)^-1 in
                  X5
                    ((a0.1;
                     transitive_card (card a0.1) (card hartogs_number)
                       (card A)
                       (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0.1 hartogs_number Ha) HN) <
                     HNO)
                    (issmall_hprop
                       ((a0.1;
                        transitive_card (card a0.1) 
                          (card hartogs_number) (card A)
                          (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0.1 hartogs_number Ha) HN) <
                        HNO)
                       (ordinal_relation_is_mere
                          (a0.1;
                          transitive_card (card a0.1) 
                            (card hartogs_number) 
                            (card A)
                            (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0.1 hartogs_number Ha)
                            HN)
                          HNO))
                    Ha)).1).1 <
                hartogs_number)
               (ordinal_relation_is_mere
                  ((let X3 :=
                      fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) =>
                      equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X3) in
                    let Ha :=
                      X3 (a0.1 < hartogs_number)
                        (issmall_hprop (a0.1 < hartogs_number)
                           (ordinal_relation_is_mere a0.1 hartogs_number))
                        a0.2
                      in
                    ((a0.1;
                     transitive_card (card a0.1) (card hartogs_number)
                       (card A)
                       (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0.1 hartogs_number Ha) HN);
                    let X4 :=
                      fun (X4 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X4) =>
                      equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X4) in
                    let X5 :=
                      fun (X5 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X5) =>
                      (equiv_smalltype X5)^-1 in
                    X5
                      ((a0.1;
                       transitive_card (card a0.1) 
                         (card hartogs_number) (card A)
                         (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0.1 hartogs_number Ha) HN) <
                       HNO)
                      (issmall_hprop
                         ((a0.1;
                          transitive_card (card a0.1) 
                            (card hartogs_number) 
                            (card A)
                            (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0.1 hartogs_number Ha)
                            HN) <
                          HNO)
                         (ordinal_relation_is_mere
                            (a0.1;
                            transitive_card (card a0.1) 
                              (card hartogs_number) 
                              (card A)
                              (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0.1 hartogs_number Ha)
                              HN)
                            HNO))
                      Ha)).1).1
                  hartogs_number))
            H))
         a0 1)
      :
      (fun X0 : ↓HNO =>
       (fun proj1 : hartogs_number' =>
        (fun (a0 : Ordinal) (Ha : card a0 ≤ card A)
           (H : smalltype ((a0; Ha) < HNO)) =>
         let X1 :=
           fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
           equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
         let H0 :=
           X1 ((a0; Ha) < HNO)
             (issmall_hprop ((a0; Ha) < HNO)
                (ordinal_relation_is_mere (a0; Ha) HNO))
             H
           in
         (a0;
         let X2 :=
           fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
           equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
         let X3 :=
           fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1
           in
         X3 (a0 < hartogs_number)
           (issmall_hprop (a0 < hartogs_number)
              (ordinal_relation_is_mere a0 hartogs_number))
           H0))
          proj1.1 proj1.2)
         X0.1 X0.2)
      o (fun X0 : ↓hartogs_number =>
         (fun (a0 : Ordinal) (Ha : smalltype (a0 < hartogs_number)) =>
          let X1 :=
            fun (X1 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X1) =>
            equiv_fun (equiv_smalltype X1) in
          let Ha0 :=
            X1 (a0 < hartogs_number)
              (issmall_hprop (a0 < hartogs_number)
                 (ordinal_relation_is_mere a0 hartogs_number))
              Ha
            in
          ((a0;
           transitive_card (card a0) (card hartogs_number) 
             (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0 hartogs_number Ha0) HN);
          let X2 :=
            fun (X2 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X2) =>
            equiv_isequiv (equiv_smalltype X2) in
          let X3 :=
            fun (X3 : Type) (IsSmall : IsSmall X3) => (equiv_smalltype X3)^-1
            in
          X3
            ((a0;
             transitive_card (card a0) (card hartogs_number) 
               (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0 hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
             HNO)
            (issmall_hprop
               ((a0;
                transitive_card (card a0) (card hartogs_number) 
                  (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0 hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
                HNO)
               (ordinal_relation_is_mere
                  (a0;
                  transitive_card (card a0) (card hartogs_number) 
                    (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0 hartogs_number Ha0)
                    HN)
                  HNO))
            (Ha0
             :
             (a0;
             transitive_card (card a0) (card hartogs_number) 
               (card A) (le_Cardinal_lt_Ordinal a0 hartogs_number Ha0) HN) <
             HNO)))
           X0.1 X0.2) ==
      idmap)
     a')
 reflexivity.
  Defined.

End Hartogs_Number.
